mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE state_id NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED')) as "totalActiveOrders", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE state_id = 'CREATED' OR state_id = 'CONFIRMED') as "pendingOrders", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE state_id = 'SHIPPED') as "shippedOrders", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE state_id = 'DELIVERED') as "deliveredOrders", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE state_id = 'CANCELLED') as "cancelledOrders", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM returnrequest WHERE state_id NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'REJECTED', 'CANCELLED')) as "openReturns", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM support_tickets WHERE state_id NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED')) as "openTickets", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment WHERE state_id = 'FAILED') as "failedPayments", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM settlements WHERE state_id = 'PENDING') as "pendingSettlements", (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE state_id NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED') AND DATE(created_time) = CURRENT_DATE) as "todayRevenue"

SELECT o.id as "orderId", o.order_number as "orderNumber", o.state_id as "orderState", o.total_amount as "totalAmount", o.currency as "currency", o.item_count as "itemCount", o.created_time as "orderCreatedTime", o.last_modified_time as "orderModifiedTime", o.customer_id as "customerId", u.first_name as "customerFirstName", u.last_name as "customerLastName", u.email as "customerEmail", u.phone as "customerPhone", pay.id as "paymentId", pay.state_id as "paymentStatus", pay.payment_method as "paymentMethod", pay.amount as "paymentAmount", pay.currency as "paymentCurrency", pay.gateway_transaction_id as "gatewayTransactionId", pay.failure_reason as "paymentFailureReason", pay.created_time as "paymentTime", sh.id as "shipmentId", sh.state_id as "shippingStatus", sh.carrier as "carrier", sh.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", sh.shipping_method as "shippingMethod", sh.estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate", sh.actual_delivery_date as "actualDeliveryDate", sh.current_location as "currentLocation", sh.delivery_attempts as "deliveryAttempts", fo.id as "fulfillmentId", fo.state_id as "fulfillmentStatus", fo.warehouse_id as "warehouseId", fo.priority as "fulfillmentPriority", fo.assigned_picker_id as "assignedPicker", fo.assigned_packer_id as "assignedPacker" FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user_profiles u ON o.customer_id = u.id LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN shipments sh ON sh.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN fulfillment_orders fo ON fo.order_id = o.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId}

SELECT oa.id as "activityId", oa.order_id as "orderId", oa.activity_name as "activityName", oa.activity_comment as "comment", oa.activity_success as "success", oa.created_by as "performedBy", oa.created_time as "activityTime" FROM order_activity oa WHERE oa.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oa.created_time ASC
